title: Mailchimp vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Flodesk email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which suits your business best.
intro: Mailchimp and Flodesk are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Mailchimp offers a free tier and affordability for beginners, while Flodesk focuses on stunning design and unlimited subscribers at a flat rate. Your choice depends on budget, design priorities, and business needs.
choose_a_if: You're a beginner or small business with a limited budget
You need a free tier to test before committing financially
You want advanced automation and A/B testing features
choose_b_if: Design and visual appeal are your top priorities
You need unlimited subscribers from day one
You want a simple, transparent flat-rate pricing model

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your priorities. Mailchimp excels for budget-conscious beginners and those needing advanced automation features. Flodesk wins if you prioritize beautiful design and unlimited subscriber access. Flodesk has significantly higher customer satisfaction ratings across G2 and Trustpilot.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Flodesk?
faq.a: Mailchimp is cheaper upfront with a free tier and plans starting at $13/month. Flodesk starts at a flat $38/month with no free option. However, Flodesk's unlimited subscribers mean it may be more cost-effective for growing businesses that would pay more on Mailchimp's tiered pricing.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support email list exports and integrations. Migration is typically straightforward—you can export your contacts and import them into Mailchimp. Most data (emails, names, custom fields) transfers easily, though design templates won't port over since they're platform-specific.
